metadata.source_title: Strengthen purchasing conditions with NIS2 clauses

text: ABN AMRO Editorial. The NIS2 guideline places high demands on organizations and their suppliers. This European law obliges companies to improve their digital resilience. If a supplier does not meet cybersecurity requirements, your company can still be held responsible. It is therefore important to record clear agreements in the purchasing conditions.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen purchasing conditions with NIS2 clauses

text: The NIS2 guideline places high demands on organizations and their suppliers. This European law obliges companies to improve their digital resilience. If a supplier does not meet cybersecurity requirements, your company can still be held responsible. It is therefore important to record clear agreements in the purchasing conditions. With clear purchasing conditions you determine what you expect from suppliers.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen purchasing conditions with NIS2 clauses

text: This European law obliges companies to improve their digital resilience. If a supplier does not meet cybersecurity requirements, your company can still be held responsible. It is therefore important to record clear agreements in the purchasing conditions. With clear purchasing conditions you determine what you expect from suppliers. For example, about information security and risk management.

metadata.source_title: Strengthen purchasing conditions with NIS2 clauses

text: If a supplier does not meet cybersecurity requirements, your company can still be held responsible. It is therefore important to record clear agreements in the purchasing conditions.
